kirundi.for_pm_times_after_noon_subtract_12_fr: Ku bihe bya PM nyuma ya saa sita, kuramo 12 ku isaha.
kirundi.for_am_times_the_hour_stays_the_same: Ku bihe bya AM, isaha iguma imwe.
kirundi.move_one_representation_and_watch_anal: Imura igaragaza rimwe urebe uko igihe cy'inshinge, icy'amasaha 12 n'icy'amasaha 24 bibandanya guhuzwa.
kirundi.break_an_interval_into_friendly_jumps_: Gabanya intera mo ibisimbuko vyoroshye kugera ku isaha yuzuye, hanyuma uteranye ibisimbuko.
kirundi.the_interval_is_zero_so_start_and_end_: Intera ni zeru, bityo intangiriro n'iherezo ni bimwe.
kirundi.use_12_hour_form_with_am_or_pm: Koresha uburyo bw'amasaha 12 bufite AM canke PM.
kirundi.enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_1_: Andika iminota canke igihe kimara, nka s 1 min 15.
kirundi.not_yet_draw_jumps_between_the_two_tim: Ntivyarakunda. Shushanya ibisimbuko hagati y'ibihe bibiri hanyuma wongere ugerageze.
kirundi.compare_event_lengths_free_time_gaps_a: Gereranya uburebure bw'ibintu, ibyuho by'igihe cy'ubusa, n'ubugari bwa gahunda yose.
kirundi.mark_both_times_on_a_number_line_jump_: Shyira ibimenyetso ku bihe vyompi ku murongo w'imibare. Simbuka ujya ku isaha yuzuye yoroshye, wongereho amasaha yuzuye, hanyuma urangize n'iminota isigaye.
kirundi.enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_2_: Andika iminota canke igihe kimara, nka s 2 min 15.
kirundi.not_yet_use_a_clock_timeline_or_minute: Ntivyarakunda. Koresha isaha, umurongo w'igihe, canke iminota nyuma ya saa sita z'ijoro.
kirundi.retry_set_complete_returning_to_all_ch: Itsinda ryo kongera kugerageza ryarangiye. Gusubira ku mbogamizi zose.
kirundi.a_stable_deterministic_practice_set_wi: Itsinda ry'imyitozo rihamye kandi rigenwe rifite ibyiciro by'ubukana n'umurongo witaye ku kongera gukora izabuze.
kirundi.durations_may_be_entered_in_total_minu: Ibihe bimara bishobora kwandikwa mu iminota yose canke mu masaha n'iminota.
kirundi.you_may_use_either_12_hour_or_24_hour_: Ushobora gukoresha uburyo bw'amasaha 12 canke bw'amasaha 24.
kirundi.draw_jumps_to_a_friendly_hour: Shushanya ibisimbuko kugera ku isaha yuzuye yoroshye.
kirundi.convert_each_time_to_minutes_after_mid: Hindura buri gihe mo iminota nyuma ya saa sita z'ijoro.
kirundi.for_a_missing_start_count_backward_fro: Ku ntangiriro ibuze, bara ugaruka inyuma uhereye ku iherezo.
kirundi.crossing_midnight_begins_a_new_24_hour: Kurenga saa sita z'ijoro bitangiza uruziga rushya rw'amasaha 24.
kirundi.see_time_count_time_plan_time_and_expl: Reba igihe, bara igihe, tegura igihe, kandi usobanure ingamba yawe.
kirundi.time_and_schedule_lab_sections: Ibice bya Laboratwari y'Igihe na Gahunda
kirundi.a_clock_time_and_an_amount_of_time_are: Igihe cy'isaha n'ingano y'igihe ni ibipimo bitandukanye. Andika ingero hamwe n'ibihe bimara.
kirundi.no_timer_pressure_keyboard_friendly_te: Nta gitutu cya mminuteri · vyoroshye kuri klaviye · birimo ibindi by'inyandiko
